title: Order Payment Instrument
description: A payment instrument used on an order. Unlike the checkout payment instrument, it carries no collection-time details (no handler reference, credential, or selection state) — only what is needed to represent how the order was paid.

type.description: The broad category of the instrument (e.g., 'card', 'gift_card'). Open string field — businesses can use any values that make sense.

amount.description: The amount charged to this instrument, in the order currency's minor units (ISO 4217).

billing_address.description: The billing address associated with this payment method.

display.description: Display information for this payment instrument, suitable for rendering on an order confirmation (e.g., card brand and last four digits). Structure depends on the instrument type.
